audit_basis: Full source read: session.json, lair_audit_c70.json, LairGLBAssets.ts (full, 344 lines), MinigameBase.ts (full, 306 lines), mg_fouille.ts (full, 447 lines), mg_apaisement.ts (full, 392 lines), mg_combat_rituel.ts (full, 393 lines), mg_course.ts (full, 441 lines), mg_echo.ts (full, 486 lines), mg_equilibre.ts (full, 363 lines), mg_herboristerie.ts (full, 503 lines), mg_negociation.ts (full, 419 lines), mg_ombres.ts (full, 332 lines), mg_regard.ts (full, 431 lines), mg_runes.ts (full, 322 lines), mg_sang_froid.ts (full, 364 lines), mg_traces.ts (full, 207 lines), mg_volonte.ts (full, 376 lines), vite.config.ts (full, 33 lines).

c134_verification.showFoundStatus_method: CONFIRMED — mg_fouille.ts lines 245-250: private showFoundStatus(): void { const timePct = Math.max(0, this.timeLeft / this.totalTime); const bonus = Math.round(50 + timePct * 50); const statusEl = document.getElementById('mg-fouille-status'); if (statusEl) statusEl.textContent = `Trouvé ! +${bonus} pts`; }
c134_verification.called_from_onKeyDown: CONFIRMED — mg_fouille.ts line 232: this.showFoundStatus(); // C134: show inline bonus before overlay (Enter/Space path)
c134_verification.called_from_onClick: CONFIRMED — mg_fouille.ts line 266: this.showFoundStatus(); // C134: show inline bonus before overlay (pointer path)
c134_verification.verdict: C134 FULLY IMPLEMENTED. BUG from C67 (LOW, carried C68→C70) is CLOSED. statusEl now shows 'Trouvé ! +N pts' with the actual computed bonus before the 400ms foundTimeout fires endGame().

rendu_3d.problem: Flat-shading coherent on all GLBs and procedurals. 5-source lighting rig intact. No z-fighting surface. Crystal PBR exclusion correct. Theoretical limit unchanged: no hemispherical fill or IBL — stone surface detail relies entirely on flatShading facet contrast from 5 PointLights. A hemisphere fill would add 0.2-0.3 units of surface richness without budget impact.

asset_quality.problem: All 7 GLB slots confirmed with procedural fallbacks (cauldron, 3x bougie, table_druidique, bibliotheque, sol_pierre, mur_pierre InstancedMesh, crystal_ball). applyFlatShading() + material.clone() on every non-cauldron path. Celtic scale relationships preserved. Theoretical limit: bibliotheque non-uniform scale (1.2, 1.0, 0.8) slightly distorts Celtic arch proportions in the Z axis; compensated by polygonOffset but not by geometric correction.

animation_fluidity.problem: Entry cinematic cubic ease-out z=10→7 over 1.2s confirmed (C70 lines 1074-1078). Dual-frequency micro-sway post-entry confirmed. Door flash 380ms, GLB fade-in 400ms rAF. entryCamDone guard prevents re-run. Theoretical limit: hover scale remains instantaneous (setScalar — no lerp). A 2-frame lerp in the update loop would improve Celtic ritual feel at zero measurable GPU cost.

bundle_size.problem: Post-C134 build: main=50.87KB gzip (25.4% of 200KB limit), minigames=24.29KB gzip (81.0% of 30KB limit), three-core=135.45KB deferred vendor. vite.config.ts confirmed: chunkSizeWarningLimit=550, minigames chunk via MinigameRegistry.ts + MinigameBase.ts static imports. C134 adds showFoundStatus() (~120 bytes unminified) — zero gzip delta. All targets met.

fps_performance.problem: FPS hysteresis [45,52] confirmed from C70 audit (lines 1112-1114). Dust motes disabled below 45fps. DPR capped at 2. InstancedMesh for mur_pierre walls (3 draw calls for 48 tiles). crystalEntry and raycastTargets cached. mg_equilibre document-level keydown listener active for full minigame duration alongside Lair's own keydown — both registered independently, no interference. No new rAF loops introduced by C134.

accessibility.problem: Full WCAG 2.1 AA stack maintained: zoneToast aria-live=off, ariaLive single-channel pointer+keyboard, all 14 canvases aria-label+role=application+tabIndex=0+touch-action:none. NEW finding: mg_ombres, mg_regard, and mg_apaisement have no keyboard navigation (no keydown listener). mg_ombres is a cursor-tracking game where keyboard arrows would be essential for keyboard-only users. mg_apaisement omits Spacebar as activation key. mg_regard has no number-key or arrow-select recall path. Score drops 10→9 from C70: 3 minigames have keyboard gaps not previously flagged.

game_feel.problem: Hover: scale 1.05 (setScalar), emissive 0.65, SFX hover event, cursor:pointer. Door: 380ms flash, emissive 1.2, double-activation guard. Click: flip SFX + ariaLive confirm. C134 showFoundStatus() delivers immediate numeric bonus ('Trouvé ! +N pts') before the 400ms overlay — perceptible improvement in click confirmation feedback. Theoretical limit: hover scale is instantaneous — zero-cost but slightly abrupt vs 2-frame ease.

player_feedback.problem: C134 CLOSES the LOW bug carried from C67: mg_fouille statusEl now shows 'Trouvé ! +N pts' with computed bonus (timePct * 50 + 50) on both pointer and keyboard paths before 400ms overlay fires. All 14 minigames have aria-live=polite status elements and timer progressbars. Score advances 9→10. Theoretical limit: mg_herboristerie instruction text hardcodes '−8 pts' (line 147) but wrongPenalty is tier-scaled [5,6,7,8] — tier-0 players see '−8 pts' but only lose 5 pts. Minor messaging inaccuracy.

balance.problem: All 14 minigames confirmed using tieredValue() for difficulty scaling. mg_equilibre: totalTime=[12,10,8,7]s, safeZoneHalf=[0.25,0.20,0.15,0.10]. mg_runes: totalPairs=[6,7,8,8], flipBackDelay=[600,550,500,450]ms. mg_traces: totalTime=[10,8,6,5]s, footprintCount=[5,7,9,11], hitRadius=[38,30,22,16]px. mg_volonte: targetRadius=[30,26,22,18]px, spawnInterval=[0.6,0.5,0.4,0.3]s. No static difficulty minigame. Theoretical limit: top-tier mg_traces hitRadius=16px at 5s is at accessibility threshold for motor-impaired players.

fun_factor.problem: All 14 minigames have Celtic-immersive lore confirmed: mg_equilibre 'ÉQUILIBRE — Marche sur le fil des druides' (line 60), mg_fouille TARGET_OBJECTS include 'Cle Ogham', 'Pierre Rune', 'Collier Anam', 'Sceau Druidique'. mg_negociation FACTION_KEYWORDS maps to 5 authentic factions (druides, anciens, korrigans, niamh, ankou) with 10 keywords each. mg_herboristerie 5 plant sets with Celtic names (Millepertuis, Menthe sauvage, Gui sacre). 14 distinct gameplay paradigms confirmed. Theoretical limit: mg_fouille title 'FOUILLE -- Trouve l objet cache' uses ASCII '--' instead of Celtic em-dash used by some other minigames — minor tonal inconsistency.

top3_problems: mg_ombres, mg_regard, mg_apaisement lack keyboard navigation: mg_ombres has no keydown listener (cursor-tracking without keyboard arrows means keyboard-only players cannot play), mg_apaisement missing Spacebar as click activation, mg_regard missing number-key or arrow-select for sequence recall — 3 minigames with WCAG 2.1.1 gaps not caught in C68-C70 (MEDIUM, newly flagged C71)

mg_herboristerie instruction text hardcodes '−8 pts' (line 147: instrEl.textContent = 'Cible : ${...} — Évite les toxiques (−8 pts)') but wrongPenalty is tieredValue([5,6,7,8]) — tier-0 beginners see '−8 pts' in instruction but only lose 5 pts per wrong pick (LOW messaging inaccuracy, newly flagged C71)

Hover scale instantaneous: setScalar(1.05) with no lerp — zero-cost but perceptually abrupt vs 2-frame ease; a lerp in the update loop would elevate Celtic ritual feel without GPU impact (LOW cosmetic, carried from C70)

flat_shading.note: applyFlatShading() enforced on all GLB paths: table_druidique (line 160), bibliotheque (line 191), sol_pierre (line 223). Cauldron: inline flatShading=true per-mesh traverse (line 102). Bougie: inline per-clone traverse (line 138). mur_pierre InstancedMesh: tileMat.flatShading=true (line 257). Crystal intentionally excluded (transparent PBR). MeshBasicMaterial instanceof guards at lines 26, 61 prevent silent cast. All procedural mats flatShading:true confirmed. No change from C70.

z_fighting.note: mortarMat polygonOffset factor=-1/units=-2 confirmed. GLB overlays: sol_pierre factor=-2/units=-4 (line 230-231), mur_pierre factor=-2/units=-4 (lines 255-258), table_druidique factor=-2/units=-4 (lines 167-170), bibliotheque factor=-2/units=-4 (lines 197-200). bougie at y=-4.85 (0.15u above floor — no offset needed). crystalGLBGroup at y=-1.0 (no floor contact). No new coplanar surface from C134. Theoretical limit: mortarMat polygonOffset units=-2 vs GLB units=-4 differential is intentional but lacks inline comment explaining tiered strategy.

material_quality.note: Stone roughness=0.95/metalness=0.0. Cauldron roughness=0.9/metalness=0.0 per-mesh (line 100-101). Wood roughness=0.8/metalness=0.0. Crystal PBR roughness implicit from GLB, emissive=0x6030aa (line 324). Potion bottles roughness=0.1 glass opacity=0.78. material.clone() on all GLB paths prevents cached prototype pollution. Book pool: 6 shared instances. No material regression from C134.

lighting_dramaturgy.note: 5-source rig confirmed: AmbientLight(0x1a1008, 0.5) + key PointLight(0xff6618, 0.9, 22, 1.6) + rim PointLight(0x6699cc, 0.55, 18, 2.0) + fill PointLight(0xcc8833, 0.4, 16, 2.0) + backAccent PointLight(0xff5500, 0.35, 12, 2.0). Low-end mobile drops backAccent, boosts fill to 0.55. Crystal PointLight pulsed in update loop. Door flicker burst 12 + sin*4 during flash. No regression from C134.

glb_coverage.note: 7 GLB slots confirmed: cauldron_merlin.glb, bougie.glb (3 clones), table_druidique.glb, bibliotheque.glb, sol_pierre.glb, mur_pierre.glb (InstancedMesh), crystal_ball.glb. All have .catch(() => {}) guards. isDisposed() guard on all .then() paths. Full callback chain: onCauldronGLBLoaded, onCrystalGLBLoaded, onCrystalGroupLoaded, onMapGLBLoaded, onShelfGLBLoaded. Procedural fallbacks remain on all failure paths. mur_pierre has no cancelHandles.push() — correct, InstancedMesh has no fadeInGLB.

geometric_proportions.note: Back wall 24x16u at z=-10, ceiling y=11, floor y=-5. Beams at y=10.5-10.8 confirmed. Cross-beams spanning z=-1. Zone placement: mapTable at x=-5, crystal at x=5, bookshelf at x=8.8, door at x=-10, cauldron at [2,-4.65,-7] (GLB). Skull at [9,-1.9,-9]. Mortar lines every 1.5u from y=-6 to y=6 at z=-9.74. Celtic hall proportions coherent. No change from C70.

bundle_gzip.note: Post-C134 build confirmed: main=50.87KB gzip (25.4% of 200KB target), minigames=24.29KB gzip, three-core=135.45KB deferred. vite.config.ts: chunkSizeWarningLimit=550, manualChunks keys: 'three-core' and 'minigames' (MinigameRegistry.ts + MinigameBase.ts as entrypoints pulling all 14 mg_*.ts). C134 showFoundStatus() adds ~120 bytes unminified — zero gzip delta. All targets met with substantial headroom.

fps_budget.note: FPS hysteresis [45,52] with 2s sampling. lowFpsMode disables dust. DPR capped at 2. InstancedMesh for 48 wall tiles → 3 draw calls. crystalEntry and raycastTargets cached, refreshed only on GLB swap. C134 adds no rAF loop. No per-frame allocation on hot path. mg_traces render loop uses performance.now() directly (line 172) for pulse animation rather than getDeltaTime() — minor inconsistency, no fps impact.

memory_leaks.note: C133 cancel chain fully confirmed in LairGLBAssets.ts: cancelHandles array (line 91), 6 push sites (cauldron line 109, bougie loop line 145 x3 runtime, table_druidique line 175, bibliotheque line 206, sol_pierre line 237, crystal_ball line 333), return cancel-all (line 343). MerlinLairScene dispose() chain: lairDisposed=true → cancelGLBFades() → stopAmbient() → clearGLBCache() → resizeObserver.disconnect() → 6 removeEventListener → clearTimeout(doorFlashCancelHandle) → scene.traverse() dispose → renderer.dispose() → 3 DOM removals. mg_equilibre override cleanup() at lines 353-361: document keydown+keyup, canvas pointerdown/up/leave, clearInterval, cancelAnimationFrame, super.cleanup(). All 14 minigame cleanup() chains verified. No new leak from C134.

feedback_zones.note: C131+C132 stack fully maintained. Mouse hover: aria-label synced + ariaLive fires. Mouse unhover: aria-label reset. Keyboard nav: aria-label synced + ariaLive announces. zoneToast: aria-live=off, role=presentation. Single AT announcement per zone change via ariaLive on both pointer and keyboard paths. WCAG 4.1.2 SC satisfied. C134 adds inline score feedback in mg_fouille statusEl before overlay — consistent with feedback_zones philosophy.

mobile_touch.note: touch-action:none on renderer.domElement. onTouchMove passive:false, onTouchStart passive:false, onTouchEnd clears hover. Touch bridge uses changedTouches fallback. All 14 minigame canvases: touch-action:none in inline style confirmed. mg_equilibre canvas.addEventListener('pointerdown', onPointerDown) + canvas.addEventListener('pointerup', onPointerUp) + canvas.addEventListener('pointerleave', onPointerUp) — touch covered via Pointer Events API. Minor: touchmove removeEventListener missing options={passive:false} — harmless, unchanged from C70.

keyboard_nav.note: Lair: Tab/Arrow forward+backward across 5 zones, Enter/Space activates, auto-focus on mount. 11 of 14 minigames have explicit keyboard handlers (keydown listener). NEW finding C71: mg_ombres (pointermove only — no keydown), mg_apaisement (pointerdown only — Spacebar not wired), mg_regard (pointerdown only — no arrow/number key recall path). These 3 minigames have WCAG 2.1.1 gaps. Score drops 10→9 from C70 baseline. mg_fouille C129/C130 pattern (ArrowKey cursor + Enter/Space + crosshair) fully confirmed; mg_combat_rituel C128 confirmed; mg_herboristerie C96 confirmed; mg_sang_froid C96/C98 confirmed; mg_volonte C128 confirmed; mg_echo C111 confirmed.

scene_entry_flow.note: Entry cinematic confirmed: ENTRY_CAM_DURATION=1.2, camera.position.z 10→7 cubic ease-out, entryCamDone flag. Camera start [0,0.5,10], lookAt(0,0,-4), FOV=62, fog(0x0d0a08,12,28). Dual-frequency micro-sway post-entry. No change from C70.

hover_feedback.note: Raycasting via THREE.Raycaster on 5 invisible hit targets. Scale=1.05 on visualMesh. emissiveIntensity=0.65 via applyHoverTo(). hover SFX CustomEvent. cursor:pointer. Door hover: doorLight intensity boost in update loop. Crystal hover: crystalGLBMat emissive sync. onTouchEnd clears hover. applyHoverTo: MeshStandardMaterial instanceof guard. Instantaneous scale (no lerp) remains only cosmetic concern.

transition_to_run.note: Door cinematic: doorFlashing guard. 380ms setTimeout before cb(found.zone). lairDisposed guard in callback. Keyboard path mirrors pointer exactly. clearTimeout(doorFlashCancelHandle) in dispose. Double-activation guard on both paths. No regression from C134.

lore_coherence.note: ZONE_LORE: 5 unique Celtic mythological anchors (map, crystal, bookshelf, cauldron, door). mg_equilibre C133: 'ÉQUILIBRE — Marche sur le fil des druides' (line 60) + 'Garde l\'équilibre sur le Chemin d\'Ogham' (line 66). mg_runes RUNE_SET: 8 authentic Ogham unicode symbols with tree names (Beith, Luis, Fearn, Nuin, Coll, Huath, Duir, Tinne). mg_fouille TARGET_OBJECTS: 'Cle Ogham', 'Bague Sacree', 'Fiole Lune', 'Sceau Druidique', 'Plume Merlin', 'Pierre Rune', 'Collier Anam', 'Broche Cerf'. mg_negociation FACTION_KEYWORDS: 5 factions with 10 Celtic keywords each. mg_herboristerie 5 plant sets with Breton/Celtic herbal names. All 14 minigames confirmed. C134 adds 'Trouvé !' (accent correct) in statusEl feedback — lore-consistent.

zone_narration.note: 5 zones with distinct story roles: map=biome selection, crystal=oghams, bookshelf=journal, cauldron=dialogue_merlin, door=run start. GDB mapping comment. Each zone: unique lore text + unique emissive baseline + unique hit geometry. Skull + potion bottles + LairDensity add ambient narrative density. lairWindow (forest view + day/night/season) adds temporal narrative layer. No regression from C134.

celtic_immersion.note: C133 Celtic lore upgrade fully confirmed in mg_equilibre. All 14 minigames carry Celtic-flavored lore: mg_negociation factions (druides/anciens/korrigans/niamh/ankou) with authentic keywords (gui, chene, cairn, ancestral, Brocéliande, ruse, brume, lac, ombre, crepuscule). Color palette: stoneMat #3a3228, mortarMat #2a2420, crystal #6030aa emissive, door amber, cauldron emissive #00aa33. MinigameBase OUTCOME_CONFIG: 4 Celtic-flavor texts. Lore vocabulary: Cerridwen, Brocéliande, ogham, druide, Bretagne, ancestral. Score maintained at 10.

bugs.description: mg_ombres has no keyboard navigation: only pointermove is registered (line 102), no keydown listener. Keyboard-only players cannot control the cursor and will score 0 every run. This is a stealth game requiring cursor-tracking through a corridor — arrow-key cursor movement (matching mg_sang_froid C96 pattern) is the standard fix. The game is effectively inaccessible without a pointer device.
bugs.fix: Add onKeyDown handler mirroring mg_sang_froid C96/C98 pattern: Arrow keys move cursorX/cursorY by step=8px, clamp to [0,canvasW]/[0,canvasH], auto-center on first arrow press if cursorX===0 && cursorY===canvasH/2. Register in setup(), remove in cleanup().

bugs.description: mg_apaisement has no keyboard activation: only pointerdown is registered (line 107). Spacebar/Enter as breath-tap activation key is missing. A keyboard-only player who tabs to the canvas and presses Space will not trigger a breath tap — the game plays out with 0 taps and scores 0.
bugs.fix: Add onKeyDown handler: Space or Enter key calls onPointerDown with a synthetic event (or extract tap logic into a shared triggerTap() method). Register canvas.addEventListener('keydown', onKeyDown) in setup(), remove in cleanup().

bugs.description: mg_herboristerie instruction text hardcodes '−8 pts' (line 147: instrEl.textContent = `Cible : ${targetPlant.name} — Évite les toxiques (−8 pts)`) but wrongPenalty is tier-scaled via tieredValue([5,6,7,8]). At difficultyTier=0 (first 2 plays), penalty is 5 pts but displayed as 8 pts. The description in the setStaticMessage on line 146 (always 8) also conflicts. Tier-0 beginners are given incorrect information.
bugs.fix: Replace hardcoded '−8 pts' with template literal using this.wrongPenalty: `Cible : ${this.targetPlant.name} — Évite les toxiques (−${this.wrongPenalty} pts)`. The buildGrid() call already sets this.wrongPenalty before instrEl.textContent is assigned.

bugs.description: mg_regard has no keyboard navigation for sequence recall (only pointerdown at line 122, no keydown). During the recall phase, keyboard-only players cannot click any cell. The memory game is fully inaccessible without a pointer device. A number-key (1-5) or arrow+Enter grid navigation would allow keyboard access.
bugs.fix: Add onKeyDown handler: ArrowLeft/Right/Up/Down navigate a keyCol/keyRow selection (mirroring mg_herboristerie C96 pattern), Enter/Space fires onClick on selected cell. Show selected cell highlight during recall phase. Register in setup(), remove in cleanup().

top3_issues: BUG#1 (MEDIUM): mg_ombres has no keyboard navigation — pointermove-only game locks out keyboard-only players completely (score=0 every run). Arrow-key cursor pattern from mg_sang_froid C96/C98 is the established fix template (mg_ombres.ts line 102).

BUG#3 (LOW): mg_herboristerie instruction hardcodes '−8 pts' but wrongPenalty is tieredValue([5,6,7,8]) — tier-0 beginners see incorrect penalty amount, undermining trust in the feedback system (mg_herboristerie.ts line 147).

BUG#2+BUG#4 (LOW, paired): mg_apaisement (no Spacebar tap) and mg_regard (no keyboard cell selection) complete the accessibility audit gap — 3 of 14 minigames discovered C71 with WCAG 2.1.1 gaps not flagged in C68-C70 cycles.
top3_strengths: C134 fully closes the fouille bonus display gap (LOW, carried C67-C70): showFoundStatus() method computes timePct and bonus inline, called from both onKeyDown (Enter/Space) and onClick paths before the 400ms foundTimeout — player now sees 'Trouvé ! +N pts' immediately on success, advancing player_feedback DM score 9→10.

Cancel chain from C133 remains production-perfect: 6 cancelHandles push sites in LairGLBAssets.ts with return cancel-all, called as second operation in MerlinLairScene dispose() — memory_leaks AAA score maintained at 10 with zero regression.

Celtic immersion fully coherent across all 14 minigames: mg_negociation FACTION_KEYWORDS with 5 authentic factions (50 unique Celtic keywords total), mg_runes 8 authentic Ogham tree names, mg_herboristerie 5 Celtic plant sets, mg_fouille 8 Celtic TARGET_OBJECTS — the most ethnographically grounded minigame suite in the C68-C71 audit window.

c70_delta.aaa: +0.00 (9.44 → 9.44) — C134 closes fouille bonus gap (positive), but 3 new keyboard_nav gaps discovered (BUG#1 MEDIUM + BUG#2/4 LOW) offset the gain; keyboard_nav drops 10→9, partially absorbed by the fouille fix; net zero at AAA level
c70_delta.double: +0.04 (9.43 → 9.47) — player_feedback advances 9→10 (C134 fouille bonus display); accessibility drops 10→9 (3 minigames with keyboard gaps); net +0.04

list: BUG#1 (MEDIUM): mg_ombres no keyboard navigation — pointermove-only, keyboard-only players score 0 (mg_ombres.ts line 102)
BUG#2 (LOW): mg_apaisement no Spacebar/Enter activation — keyboard-only players cannot trigger breath taps (mg_apaisement.ts line 107)
BUG#3 (LOW): mg_herboristerie instruction shows '−8 pts' hardcoded but wrongPenalty is tier-scaled [5,6,7,8] (mg_herboristerie.ts line 147)
BUG#4 (LOW): mg_regard no keyboard navigation for sequence recall — keyboard-only players cannot click cells in recall phase (mg_regard.ts line 122)

summary: C71 post-C134 audit. DOUBLE MODE advances to 9.47 (+0.04 vs C70) driven by player_feedback 9→10: showFoundStatus() in mg_fouille now delivers the correct 'Trouvé ! +N pts' inline score on both pointer and keyboard paths before the 400ms overlay, closing the LOW bug carried since C67. AAA ULTRA holds at 9.44 (net zero delta): the fouille feedback improvement is offset by the discovery of 3 previously undetected keyboard accessibility gaps across mg_ombres (MEDIUM — no arrow-key cursor in a cursor-tracking game), mg_apaisement (LOW — no Spacebar/Enter tap activation), and mg_regard (LOW — no keyboard cell selection in recall phase). A fourth new LOW issue is mg_herboristerie's hardcoded '−8 pts' penalty display conflicting with the tiered wrongPenalty value (5 at tier 0, 8 at tier 3). These 4 bugs are newly flagged C71 and were not present in the C68-C70 audit record. The cancel chain (C133), Celtic lore suite (C133), bundle size, memory leak disposition, and 3D rendering pipeline all hold stable. Combined verdict: PROCEED — both scores remain above the 9.0 threshold with 1 MEDIUM and 3 LOW bugs queued. Recommended next cycle: close BUG#1 (mg_ombres keyboard) as the highest-severity open item, followed by BUG#3 (herboristerie penalty text, one-line fix) as the lowest-cost correction.
